entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-established centralized exchange launched in 2024 and offering cryptocurrency, forex, and stock-CFD trading with AI-assisted and social features.
entity.notes: AIVORA's official About page states that the platform was established in 2024 in the British Virgin Islands and later set up subsidiaries in Dubai, Malaysia, and Singapore. HEI uses the founding jurisdiction and a year-level launch date because no exact public launch day is stated.

events.title: AIVORA established
events.description: AIVORA was established in the British Virgin Islands in 2024 as a centralized multi-asset trading platform with cryptocurrency and derivatives products.
events.notes: The official sources identify the establishment year but not the exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Aivora Exchange official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Aivora Exchange identity and active trading platform.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchanges reference for Aivora Exchange
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Aivora Exchange identity.

evidence.title: AIVORA About Us
evidence.notes: Official company profile states that AIVORA was established in 2024 in the British Virgin Islands and describes its exchange products.

evidence.title: AIVORA User Agreement
evidence.notes: Official agreement documents Aivora as the provider of the platform and services during 2024.
